escalation.rationale: Active US-Israeli war against Iran with nuclear facilities targeted, Russian spring offensive launched against Ukraine, and US warning of potential weapons redirection from Ukraine to Iran conflict.

ticker_items: Israel strikes Iranian nuclear reactor; UN warns of potential catastrophe
US deploys landmines in Iran, 20,000 sailors trapped in Persian Gulf
Russia launches spring offensive with 400-drone barrage on Ukraine
Rubio claims Iran war will end 'within weeks' without ground troops
IDF chief warns of army 'collapse' as Lebanon ground offensive intensifies

eastern_europe.description: Russia launched nearly 400 drones plus 23 cruise and 7 ballistic missiles in major spring offensive assault.
Ukrainian drone strike damaged Russian Project 23550 Arctic patrol ship Purga under construction.
Russia launches nearly 400 drones, 23 cruise missiles and 7 ballistic missiles in spring offensive escalation.
Russia fired nearly 400 drones plus cruise and ballistic missiles in major spring offensive launch

middle_east.description: Israel launched new wave of strikes on Iranian weapons production facilities in the heart of Tehran.
Iran launched 83rd wave of missile strikes on Israel with messages thanking India and Germany written on missiles.
Kuwait's main commercial port damaged in drone attack causing material damage but no casualties.
Iran strikes Saudi airbase hosting US forces, wounding at least 15 American troops.
US-Israeli forces strike Iranian nuclear facilities as part of ongoing military campaign.
Israeli airstrikes hit Iranian heavy water nuclear reactor with no reported radiation leak
US deployed Gator Scatterable Mine system over Iranian village, several casualties reported

claimed_totals.claim: US-Israel attacks on Iran death toll
US soldier deaths in Iran war

claimed_totals.figure: 1,937 dead in Iran, 19 in Israel, 13 US soldiers, 25 in Gulf states
1,937 dead Iran, 19 Israel, 13 US soldiers, 25 Gulf states

observers.description: Zelenskyy courting Saudi support as Ukraine seeks Gulf backing amid US focus shifting to Middle East. Iran banned sports teams from traveling to 'hostile' countries including Saudi Arabia.
Kim Jong Un signed new friendship treaty with Belarus President Lukashenko in Pyongyang. Treaty marks shift to 'fundamentally new stage' in bilateral relations according to Minsk.
German defense spending reached 2.4% of GDP in 2025. Iranian missiles displayed messages thanking 'People of Germany' during latest strikes on Israel.

UK commits additional £100 million air defence package for Ukraine to protect cities and critical infrastructure. The funding aims to help defend against Russia's relentless attacks on civilian targets.

Ukrainian forces report Iran is adopting Russian drone tactics, with military delegation stating Iran, North Korea, China and Russia represent one unified war effort. China continues strategic support through technology transfers.

Announced plans to open embassy in North Korea following talks between Lukashenko and Kim Jong-un. Signed new treaty on friendship and cooperation, marking shift to 'fundamentally new stage' in relations.

Reprising its historical role as diplomatic broker as US and Iran edge closer to wider confrontation. Facing separate escalating conflict with Taliban-controlled Afghanistan as another nuclear threshold approaches.

financial.brent_crude: Elevated due to Strait of Hormuz blockade
financial.notes: Iranian blockade of Strait of Hormuz has trapped 20,000 sailors and continues disrupting global maritime trade routes.
